name: io.github.Mibayy/token-savior
description: Structural codebase MCP server — navigate and edit code by symbol name, not raw text.

environmentVariables.name: WORKSPACE_ROOTS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of absolute paths to project roots to index.

environmentVariables.name: TOKEN_SAVIOR_CLIENT
environmentVariables.description: Optional client identifier (e.g. 'claude-code', 'cursor', 'hermes') for usage attribution.
